meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no marketing skills (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no marketing skills. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Solve Marketing Gaps for Developers
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap between coding and marketing. Learn how to use Claude Code and Antigravity to automate your SaaS growth and build a winning portfolio.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing degree to launch; you need an automated growth stack. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you can transform your technical documentation into high-converting landing pages and social content, effectively outsourcing your marketing tasks to an AI agent while you focus on shipping core product features.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks perfecting your architecture, squashing bugs, and refining your database schema. Yet, the repository remains a ghost town. The silent killer of every student's first SaaS project isn't a lack of technical prowess—it’s the paralysis that sets in when you realize your code doesn't market itself.

But here is the secret: the modern developer doesn't need to be a copywriter. You need to be an orchestrator. By leveraging Claude Code’s command-line intelligence alongside the structural power of Antigravity, you can turn your codebase into a marketing engine that generates value-driven content automatically. Stop wishing for a marketing department and start building the AI agent that acts as one.

steps.title: Contextualize the Repository
steps.description: Before automating marketing, the AI must understand your product's unique value proposition. We will analyze your core files to extract 'Why' statements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the README.md and core service logic. Extract three distinct pain points this SaaS solves and convert them into human-centric benefit statements.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --read-files src/components --prompt 'Identify key features and output a marketing summary'

steps.title: Generate Content Schemas
steps.description: Use Antigravity to define the structure of your landing page copy, ensuring it follows proven conversion frameworks like AIDA.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a JSON schema for a high-converting landing page that highlights the features identified in Step 1 using the AIDA framework.

steps.title: Automate Copywriting
steps.description: Feed your repository context into Claude Code to generate actual marketing collateral based on your schema.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a 300-word landing page intro and 3 social media posts based on the marketing_schema.json and the project's codebase.

steps.title: Build Dynamic SEO Meta-Tags
steps.description: Ensure your project is discoverable by automating the generation of SEO meta-data directly from your component descriptions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate optimized meta-titles and descriptions for all routes defined in the project, targeting the 'AI Builder' niche.

steps.title: Continuous Feedback Loop
steps.description: Set up a Claude Code watch-task that updates your marketing assets whenever you commit new features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a pre-commit hook that triggers a summary of new feature commits to update a 'changelog.md' for marketing purposes.

pro_tips: Always instruct Claude Code to adopt the tone of your specific user persona, not just 'general marketing' tone.
Use Antigravity to parse your Git history to find the 'struggle points' you solved; these make the best marketing stories.
Never post raw AI output; use Claude Code to run a 'critique' pass on your own copy to ensure it sounds like a human engineer.
Store your marketing prompts in a /docs/marketing folder inside your repo so they evolve alongside your code.
Leverage Claude's ability to read your tests to generate 'social proof' content—if it passes the test, it's a reliable feature to brag about.
content.next_steps: After automating your initial marketing assets, deploy your landing page to Vercel and use Claude Code to monitor performance metrics, allowing you to iterate on your copy based on real user engagement data.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just a coder; you are a product owner with a growth engine. Stop waiting for the perfect moment and start shipping the perfect narrative. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
